title: pelargonium × glauciifolium
intro: Pelargonium × glauciifolium, also known as Blue Mondo or Silver Leaf Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate anxiety. The health benefits of Pelargonium × glauciifolium include its ability to calm the stomach, ease respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often taken as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and antiseptic properties.
